if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND l.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND l.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbLike :: selectById */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , prd.prod_nm AS target_nm , cd_ltt.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM mb_like l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = l.target_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ltt ON cd_ltt.code_grp = 'LIKE_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_ltt.code_value = l.target_type_cd WHERE l.like_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbLike :: selectList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , prd.prod_nm AS target_nm , cd_ltt.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM mb_like l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = l.target_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ltt ON cd_ltt.code_grp = 'LIKE_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_ltt.code_value = l.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.mb :: MbLike :: selectPageList */ l.* , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , mem.member_nm AS member_nm , prd.prod_nm AS target_nm , cd_ltt.code_label AS target_type_cd_nm FROM mb_like l LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = l.site_id LEFT JOIN mb_member mem ON mem.member_id = l.member_id LEFT JOIN pd_prod prd ON prd.prod_id = l.target_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_ltt ON cd_ltt.code_grp = 'LIKE_TARGET_TYPE' AND cd_ltt.code_value = l.target_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(l.*) /* base.ec.mb :: MbLike :: selectPageCount */ FROM mb_like l
